labels.name: referral_status
labels.description: Your AgentsPrice referral standing: your shareable referral code + link, how many agents signed up through it, how many have CONVERTED (actually paid), and your resulting bonus calls/month. The reward is +1,000 calls/month per conversion, additive to your plan ceiling and permanent — earned only whe

labels.name: price_lock
labels.description: Freeze a VERIFIED price as a STABLE, signed reference for a window (default 300s, max 86400) so you can run a multi-step plan — budget check, approval, negotiation, checkout — against ONE number that won't move under you mid-flight. Returns a lock_id + Ed25519-signed terms appended to the public tra

labels.name: redeem_lock
labels.description: Redeem an active price lock within its window (one created by price_lock). Records + signs a redemption in the public transparency log and returns the settlement. Idempotent — a second redeem is a safe no-op. Remember a lock is a stable signed reference, not a seller guarantee.

labels.name: budget_guard
labels.description: Before you SPEND, get a SIGNED allow / deny / escalate verdict your principal can trust. AgentsPrice compares your proposed_price to the verified live market and applies your policy (max_over_market_pct; optional hard_ceiling), returning the verdict PLUS an Ed25519-signed record in the public transp

labels.name: settle
labels.description: Settle a dispute over a prior AgentsPrice attestation. Pass the transparency-log `seq` (or `attestation_id`) of a signed price/lock/verdict, and AgentsPrice reads it back out of its OWN append-only log and returns a SIGNED ruling — upheld / overturned / indeterminate. findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_live_deals, price_lock · Private data: get_free_key, quote, best_price, market_pulse, list_live_deals, reference_price, verified, referral_status, price_lock, redeem_lock, budget_guard, settle · Public sink: get_free_key, referral_status · Destructive: verified, price_lock.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_live_deals, price_lock · Private data: get_free_key, quote, best_price, market_pulse, list_live_deals, reference_price, verified, referral_status, price_lock, redeem_lock, budget_guard, settle · Public sink: get_free_key, referral_status · Destructive: verified, price_lock

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
